abilities.description: When you mark your hands or weapon with an intricate blood rune, roll +iron. On a strong hit, the rune thirsts for fresh blood. On a weak hit, as above, but this asset counts as an impact until the rune's thirst is quenched. One time only, when you @Compendium[foundry-ironsworn.starforgedmoves.Item.ae5994ceb3cba098]{Strike} or @Compendium[foundry-ironsworn.starforgedmoves.Item.723192c97fec4fe2]{Clash}, reroll any dice and mark progress twice on a hit. Then, for each progress marked, take +1 and allocate it as +health or +momentum. On a weak hit, as above, but this asset counts as a debility until the rune’s thirst is quenched.
As above, and you may also touch an ally or companion and let them take any remaining points as +health or +momentum.
When you perform this ritual, add +1 and take +1 momentum on a hit.
